title: trachydium rigens
intro: Trachydium rigens, also known as the Chinese club moss, is a type of evergreen plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Trachydium rigens is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs for enhanced therapeutic effects.
